what_it_does: Acts as a noticeboard document that defines a short-lived, operational 'Working' space for proposals, decisions, and incoming agent outputs that are awaiting user feedback; it also lists an ordered sequence of related board items.
observations: Title is 'Working — proposals, decisions & agent outputs' after a history edit described as 'short-lead title'.
Body distinguishes this space from the durable client profile.
Order field references three other board items: board://item-f8923cfa, board://item-b40afa03, board://item-2d491d36.
History shows filed, order edit, and title edit transitions.
State is draft, source is claude_code, channel is dragnet-development, thread and links are empty.
standouts: Explicit framing as a transient operational workspace separate from durable client profile.
Order list of three referenced board items.
History audit trail includes micro-edits for order and title.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, source, state, title, author_session, channel, order, history, created, and updated fields.
Uses board:// URI identifiers for items and references.
Maintains an ordered list of related items and a state-transition history.
Markdown body provides a human-readable description after the frontmatter.
concerns: The body is minimal and does not explain how to comment on blocks or move items out of the working state.
Order references are opaque because they do not include titles or summaries of the referenced items.
Draft state with recent title edit suggests the item may still be evolving.
notes: A draft noticeboard item that sets up a working inbox for operational proposals, decisions, and agent outputs, with an ordered list of related items and a short audit history.
questions: What content is held in each of the three ordered board items?
How does a user comment on a block, and where do those comments live?
What is the durable client profile, and how is it structured?
What criteria move an item out of this working space?
How are agent outputs represented as blocks?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches actual content: it defines a working area for proposals, decisions, and agent outputs and provides an ordered index of related items.
apparent_themes: Audit trail of edits and state changes
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish a transient, user-reviewable workspace where short-lived operational content can be collected, ordered, and responded to before being finalized or archived.
novelty: Explicitly labels the noticeboard item as a short-lived operational container distinct from a durable client profile, and uses an ordered list of board references to structure that container.
contribution: Provides a definition and ordered index for a working/operational noticeboard area, including an edit history that helps a fused system preserve the boundary between transient actionable content and durable records.
summary_for_embedding: A draft noticeboard document titled 'Working — proposals, decisions & agent outputs' that defines a short-lived operational space for pending proposals, decisions, and agent outputs and lists an ordered set of related board items.
intention_for_embedding: To create a working area where operational proposals, decisions, and incoming agent outputs can be staged for user feedback and response.
